events.title: Pasarfish Pop-Up
events.description: 16-dish pop-up reviving disappearing wet-market fish dishes; from $8.

events.title: Open Writing Sessions
events.venue: Casual Poet Library, 123 Bukit Merah Lane 1 #01-110
events.description: Friday small-group open writing sessions, 6 to 9pm; drop-in, all levels, poetry to prose.

events.title: Lazy Days with Dog & Frog
events.description: Irish comic artist Niall Breen's debut solo show making a quiet case for doing nothing; free.

events.title: GastroBeats 2026
events.description: SG's biggest food and music festival returns for its 5th edition with 40+ vendors and daily live acts; free entry.

events.title: iLight Singapore 2026
events.description: Open-air light-art trail with 14 installations by 17 local and regional artists; free.

events.title: The Retro Factory Vintage Flea Market
events.description: Vintage vinyl, toys, watches, comics and trinkets; first and third weekends monthly, free.

events.title: IMBA Flower Market
events.venue: IMBA Theatre, Gardens by the Bay
events.description: CJ Hendry fills a room with plush flowers; every visitor takes one home free, with local blooms.

events.title: We Read Together Reading Meetups
events.venue: Various cafes (Bugis, Holland Village and more)
events.description: Casual bring-your-own-book reading meetups several times a week at rotating cafes; buy a drink and read together.

events.title: Batik Workshop with Sujak Rahman
events.description: 4.5h wax-resist batik workshop with pioneering artist Sujak Rahman; all levels, materials provided. $150.

events.title: Book Discussion: Humankind by Rutger Bregman
events.venue: Casual Poet Library, 123 Bukit Merah Lane 1 #01-110
events.description: Life's Hard Love Harder book discussion of Rutger Bregman's Humankind; 11am to 1pm.

events.title: The Modern Man's Book Club
events.venue: Casual Poet Library, 123 Bukit Merah Lane 1 #01-110
events.description: Afternoon book club session, 3 to 5pm; all welcome, sign up via link in bio.

events.title: Lion City Faire
events.description: Homegrown Renaissance faire with merchant stalls, LARP, workshops and cosplay; from $22.

events.title: Garden Vibes 2026
events.description: Outdoor music and lifestyle event; see listing for venue and details.

events.title: Stranger Sounds
events.description: Low-pressure songwriting session, no experience required; 5.30 to 8pm, sign-up via @strangersounds.sg.

events.title: An Odd Flower: Life Drawing with Anna Du Toit
events.description: Guided 2.5h life-drawing with performance-artist models and handmade fermented tasters; 18+. $55/$65.

events.title: Embodied Frequencies: Opening the Channel
events.description: Online intro to channeling and light language with Malvina; 10:30am to 12:30pm. SG$55.

events.title: CraftFest SG 2026
events.description: Craft fair with nearly 1000 artists across jewelry, ceramics, textiles and illustration; free, 11am to 7pm.

events.title: Wheeler's Mid-Year Market
events.description: All-day block party with a curated lifestyle market, indie bands, free-flow drinks and yoga.

events.title: Memento Mori
events.description: Stoic mortality-reflection workshop with Life Cards, Repose and an optional casket simulation; $80.

events.title: Silent Book Club Jun 2026
events.description: Bring your own book and read in companionable silence; 2pm, capped at 25, order food or drinks at venue.

events.title: da:ns focus: Ballet by the Bay
events.description: The Royal Ballet returns after 21 years with a gala, outdoor shows and interactive ballet events.

events.title: The Hammock Market
events.description: Handmade & handpicked — thrift stores, local brands, creatives & curated closets under one roof. Free entry.

events.title: Hobbies Fair 2026
events.description: Hobbies and lifestyle fair with vendors across crafts and collectibles.

events.title: Me-You Market
events.description: Curated market bringing together regional fashion, accessories, artisan goods and food; free.

events.title: Asia Art and Craft Fair 2026
events.description: Handmade craft and art fair with 500+ creators spanning ceramics, textiles and more.

events.title: Soak & Sound
events.description: Crystal-bowl sound meditation with Yoshie; 60 min, includes a take-home body scrub. $55.

events.title: LOEWE Foundation Craft Prize 2026
events.description: 30 shortlisted artists explore innovation, material and tradition in contemporary craft.

events.title: Passion is Volcanic: Desire in Southeast Asian Art (R18)
events.description: R18 show exploring desire, eroticism and the body in Southeast Asian art.
